test_INTEG002_VRFRequestCreatedOnUnlock(.details: This tests the expected behavior after L1Vault is updated

test_FullFlow_EmergencyUnlockAfter72h().notice: Test: Emergency unlock after 72h prover non-response

test_FullFlow_VRFTimeoutFallback().notice: Test: VRF timeout triggers fallback prover selection

test_FullFlow_VRFToProverSelection().notice: Test: Full VRF → Prover selection → Signature flow

test_INTEG001_OnlyL1VaultCanRequestVRF().notice: Test: VRFConsumer should only accept requests from L1Vault

test_INTEG001_SetVRFConsumer().notice: Test: L1Vault should be able to set VRFConsumer address

test_INTEG002_LockCreation().notice: Test: Lock should succeed and be ready for unlock flow

test_INTEG002_VRFRequestCreatedOnUnlock(.notice: Test: VRF request should be created for unlock flow

test_INTEG003_ProverSelectionStakeWeight.notice: Test: Prover selection follows stake-weighted probability (2 out of 5)

test_INTEG003_VRFFulfillmentSelectsProve.notice: Test: VRF fulfillment selects provers for signing

test_INTEG004_EmergencyPathAfter72hTimeo.notice: Test: Emergency path is available after 72h prover timeout

test_SPEC002_VRFSelectionFormula().notice: Test: VRF selection formula P(i) = Stake_i / Σ Stake
